data.title: ServiceNow stock drops ahead of Q4 earnings report. Expected to post earnings of 72 cents per share, following previous $2.40 per share. Strong Q3 performance with subscription revenue at $3.3 billion, up 21.5% YoY.
data.description: ServiceNow Inc (NYSE: NOW) is experiencing a decrease in shares as investors anticipate the company's upcoming fourth-quarter earnings report. Analysts are predicting earnings of 72 cents per share for the quarter, based on estimates from Benzinga Pro. In comparison, ServiceNow reported GAAP earnings of $2.40 per diluted share in the last quarter. The company enters the report with a strong momentum following a successful third quarter, surpassing guidance across all major growth and profitability metrics. Subscription revenue rose to $3.3 billion, a 21.5% increase year-over-year, while total revenue also surged by 22% to $3.41 billion. ServiceNow demonstrated significant improvements in remaining performance metrics.
US TAKES FIRST STEPS TOWARD POSSIBLE REOPENING OF EMBASSY IN CARACAS FOR LIMITED TEMPORARY FUNCTIONS – AP.

data.title: Trump threatens 10% tariff on 8 European allies opposing Greenland acquisition, intensifying Supreme Court situation.
data.description: The President of the United States, Donald Trump, has announced a plan to enforce a 10 percent tariff starting on February 1 on eight European allies who disagree with his desire to purchase Greenland. This move intensifies the situation leading up to an imminent Supreme Court decision.

data.title: Watercrest Senior Living Group aims to enhance culinary operations in 2026, led by Executive Chef Will Poirier.
data.description: In Vero Beach, Florida, on January 27, 2026, Watercrest Senior Living Group announced their commitment to enhancing the resident dining experience through culinary excellence. The focus for the year includes growth and training efforts. Executive Chef Will Poirier, a key figure in this initiative, has been promoted recently to spearhead the culinary development.

data.title: Vacationers in 2026 urged to seek expert help for better deals & savings; highlights on National Plan for Vacation Day.
data.description: National Plan for Vacation Day is emphasizing the benefits of seeking expert assistance and accessing tailored deals to conserve time, alleviate stress, and save money on vacations. Recent data indicates that preparing for a vacation has become increasingly costly and tedious, with a growing number of travelers experiencing difficulties in navigating the process. The initiative, observed on January 27, 2026, aims to promote the advantages of utilizing curated packages and expert guidance to optimize the vacation experience. Such services have shown to be particularly beneficial as they can help individuals save considerable amounts of money and time, ensuring a more enjoyable and hassle-free trip.

data.title: Milliman analysis shows pension risk transfer cost increased to 100.3% from 100.1% in December, up by 20 basis points.
data.description: Seattle-based consulting and actuarial firm Milliman, Inc. released the most recent data from its Milliman Pension Buyout Index (MPBI) indicating a slight increase in the estimated cost to offload retiree pension risk to an insurer through a competitive bidding process. In December, the cost went up by 20 basis points from 100.1% to 100.3% of a plan's accounting liabilities (accumulated benefit obligation or ABO). This means that the estimated retiree Pension Risk Transfer (PRT) cost now stands at 100.3% of a plan's ABO.

data.title: RTW Foundation donates $8M to Perelman School of Medicine for innovative physician training program.
data.description: In Philadelphia, a significant $8 million donation from the RTW Foundation, spearheaded by Rod Wong, M’03, and Marti Speranza Wong, C’98, who is a member of the Penn Medicine Board of Trustees, is set to kick start a pioneering venture aimed at transforming medical education at the Perelman School of Medicine at the University of Pennsylvania. This donation stands as the largest ever received by PSOM to enhance its curriculum, guaranteeing that the oldest medical school in the United States will maintain its position as a top institution in preparing future physicians.

data.title: Century Park Capital Partners successfully exits MCCi, an investment banking firm in Tallahassee, Florida.
data.description: Century Park Capital Partners, an investment banking firm, has recently announced the successful exit of MCCi. The company did not disclose the exact financial details of the transaction. This news highlights the continued success of Century Park Capital Partners in their investment strategies.

data.title: PropStream introduces 2 new dialing workflows and improved skip tracing, enhancing lead-to-dial capabilities.  #LAKEFOREST #BrianTepfer
data.description: In Lake Forest, California, PropStream has introduced two updated dialing workflows and an improved skip tracing process. This enhancement aims to streamline operations and improve efficiency for users. The company's new features are designed to enhance productivity and effectiveness in reaching out to leads. This update shows PropStream's commitment to innovation and providing top-notch services to its customers.

data.title: Toll Brothers opens new luxury home community in Katy, Texas offering single-family homes in Elyson master plan.
data.description: Introducing a fresh batch of newly-built single-family homes located within the popular Elyson master plan. These homes offer modern features and amenities and are part of the thriving community that has become a top choice for homebuyers. Take advantage of this opportunity to own a home in one of the most desirable neighborhoods in the area. Contact us to learn more about these newly available homes.

data.title: Mattamy Homes has three Florida master-planned communities in the Top 25 Best-Selling list for 2025.
data.description: In Orlando, Florida on January 27, 2026, Mattamy Homes revealed that three of its master-planned communities in the state secured spots in the prestigious 2025 Top 50 Master-Planned Communities list by John Burns Research & Consulting. Impressively, all three communities made it into the Top 25 rankings.

data.title: SD legislator re-introduces Bitcoin reserve bill after initial 2025 attempt failed to pass.
data.description: In 2025, a state representative proposed legislation soon after assuming office. However, the bill was postponed and did not get passed into law.

data.description: The inaugural Cloudbound venue in New Rochelle marks the brand's initial establishment nationwide, focusing on assisting families in the early stages of their children's lives. data.title: Themis Intelligence launches Utility Knowledge Base & Human-Guided Intelligence to enhance AI for utilities. Explainable & accountable.
data.description: Themis Intelligence, a subsidiary of Survalent Technology, revealed the development of its Utility Knowledge Base on Jan. 27, 2026. The UKB interconnects procedures, operational context, and OT/IT data. This advancement aims to enhance operations by ensuring a transparent and accountable system. HGI will maintain recommendations that are easily explained and tracked.

data.title: Info-Tech LIVE 2026 in New Orleans focuses on AI, data-driven decisions, and IT leadership, Feb 3-4 at The Roosevelt New Orleans.
data.description: Info-Tech LIVE 2026 in New Orleans will take place on February 3-4 at The Roosevelt New Orleans, focusing on the transition of organizations from AI testing to full-scale implementation. The event will offer sessions on agentic AI, data-informed decision-making, and IT leadership evolution. This aims to aid Chief Information Officers (CIOs) in adapting to the changing landscape.

data.title: Florida Southern College's online MBA program earns national recognition as "Best Online Program" per U.S. News & World Report 2026.
data.description: Florida Southern College's online MBA program in Lakeland, Florida, was recently recognized in the 2026 U.S. News & World Report rankings. The program has achieved "Best" status among Best Online Programs, solidifying its position as a top-ranking program. This acknowledgment highlights the College's ongoing commitment to excellence in online education.

data.title: Laser Digital, supported by Nomura, is pursuing US bank charter to provide federally regulated crypto trading without deposit-taking.
data.description: If the proposal is accepted, the company could sidestep individual state licensing requirements and provide federally regulated cryptocurrency trading services without accepting deposits.
